{{Quote|Next came the attack on Bervin, and a brief, panicked comlink call, abruptly cut off by a bellowing inhuman roar and a horrified, distinctly human scream.|From the writings of Rebel Alliance historian Voren Na'al, describing Bervin's encounter with a wampa|<ref name="HBN" />}}
'''Bervin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] serving in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]]<ref name="HBN" /> [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] who was trained in [[Temperature/Legends|cold-climate]] combat.<ref name="GG3 note" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="FF" /> he<ref name="HBN" /> was among the 1,000 SpecForce [[Rebel trooper/Legends|troopers]] who were assigned to protect [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]],<ref name="GG3 note" /> the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] headquarters on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref> After the Alliance's [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was attacked by a [[Unidentified wampa/Legends|wampa]] outside Echo Base, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] ordered [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to patrol the base's perimeters, with Bervin being assigned to one of the perimeter posts.<ref name="HBN" />

Bervin's perimeter post was attacked by a [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]], with its roar and his screaming being heard by Derlin and Alliance [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. The wampa had [[Death/Legends|killed]] Bervin and dragged him into the Hoth wilderness. Derlin and Na'al rushed to the post to find a [[Blood/Legends|blood]] trail leading through a caved-in wall to where Bervin was dragged out. Similar attacks on soldiers at perimeter posts were done by the wampas.<ref name="HBN" />

==Behind the scenes==
In [[1989]], [[Michael Stern]] created Bervin for "[[The Horror By Night]]," a short story published in the [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''.<ref name="HBN" />
